properties.description:
We are proud to present this stylish two bedroom, two bathroom apartment in Landmark Pinnacle. Immaculately presented, the property comprises an open plan kitchen living area, two double bedrooms with built in storage, ensuite and main bathroom. Finished to a superb standard throughout, key features include stone worktops in the kitchen and porcelain tiles in the bathroom. 

Landmark Pinnacle is one of the most prestigious developments in Canary Wharf and residents will benefit from 24 hour concierge, private gym, cinema, lounge, roof terrace and golf simulator to name a few of the world class facilities. The Canary Wharf Estate is only a short walk away boasting an array of shops, bars and restaurants.

properties.description:
An exquisite, brand new two-bedroom apartment situated on the 12th floor of the popular Harcourt Tower building within the exclusive South Quay Plaza development. 

Designed for modern city living, the apartment offers a bright open-plan reception, enhanced by floor-to-ceiling windows that fill the space with natural light and a contemporary kitchen.

The Property - Set on the 36th floor of the sought-after Arena Tower, this beautifully presented fully furnished two-bedroom apartment offers contemporary riverside living with spectacular panoramic views across the River Thames towards the iconic The O2 Arena.

The apartment features a bright open-plan reception and dining area, enhanced by engineered oak flooring and floor-to-ceiling sliding doors that flood the space with natural light. From here, you step out onto a generous balcony spanning the entire width of the apartment, perfectly positioned to capture the breathtaking river and skyline views ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ an exceptional space to relax, entertain, or simply take in the scenery.

The modern kitchen is sleek and highly functional, fitted with integrated appliances including a fridge freezer, microwave, dishwasher, electric hob, and oven, creating a streamlined cooking and dining environment.

Both double bedrooms are well-proportioned and feature floor-to-ceiling built-in wardrobes. The principal bedroom benefits from a stylish en-suite shower room, while the second bedroom is served by a contemporary family bathroom complete with a separate bath and walk-in shower. The bathrooms are finished with elegant natural marble tiling, complementing the apartmentÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂs refined design.

Additional features include comfort cooling, an air filtration system, and excellent storage throughout, with hallway cupboards housing the washer/dryer and additional utilities. The property is offered fully furnished, with the bedrooms currently arranged with a king-size and double bed, making it ready for immediate occupation.

The Development - Residents of Arena Tower enjoy access to an impressive range of amenities within ÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂThe ClubÃÂ¢ÃÂÃÂ, including a gym, cardio suite, boxing area, and swimming pool, as well as a private cinema room, games room, and landscaped rooftop garden offering stunning views across the London skyline. The building also benefits from 24-hour concierge service, secure cycle and plenty of storage.

Ideally located moments from the vibrant district of Canary Wharf, residents are within easy reach of world-class shopping, dining, and global business headquarters around One Canada Square. Excellent transport connections are available via the Docklands Light Railway, Jubilee line, and Elizabeth line, ensuring swift access across London and beyond.
